task_name: Pick up the soap bottle, turn on the faucet, and put it back on the side table
instruction: I want to wash my face—please pick up the soap bottle, turn on the faucet, and then put it back on the side table where it was.
target_description: I want to wash my face—please pick up the soap bottle, turn on the faucet, and then put it back on the side table where it was.
